name: BUS TZ PAWA — Extended Agent Tools (cargo + proactive + manager)

parameters.query:
SELECT b.id, b.name, b.contact,
  (SELECT jsonb_agg(r) FROM jsonb_array_elements(b.routes) r
     WHERE LOWER(r->>'from') = LOWER($1) AND LOWER(r->>'to') = LOWER($2)) AS matching
FROM buses b
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements(b.routes) r
  WHERE LOWER(r->>'from') = LOWER($1) AND LOWER(r->>'to') = LOWER($2)
)
  AND tenant_slug = $3
LIMIT 6;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

SELECT id, name, phone, region, terminal
FROM agents
WHERE region ILIKE $1
  AND ($2::text IS NULL OR terminal ILIKE '%' || $2 || '%')
  AND tenant_slug = $3
ORDER BY name LIMIT 10;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

SELECT tracking_code, status, sender_name, sender_phone, receiver_name, receiver_phone, bus_name, bus_route, bus_departure, product_description, product_value_tzs
FROM shipments
WHERE ($1::text IS NOT NULL AND tracking_code = $1)
   OR ($2::text IS NOT NULL AND (sender_phone = $2 OR receiver_phone = $2))
  AND tenant_slug = $3
ORDER BY tracking_code DESC LIMIT 5;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

WITH q AS (
  SELECT mint_quote_ref() AS quote_ref,
         $1::numeric AS weight_kg,
         $2::numeric AS declared_value,
         $3::text   AS size_class,
         2000::numeric AS base,
         500::numeric  AS per_kg,
         10::numeric   AS maint_pct,
         CASE $3 WHEN 'small' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'medium' THEN 1.5 WHEN 'large' THEN 2.5 ELSE 1.0 END::numeric AS size_mult
), c AS (
  SELECT q.*,
    ROUND(((q.base + q.per_kg * q.weight_kg) * q.size_mult) * (1 + q.maint_pct/100)) AS total,
    ROUND(q.declared_value * 0.8) AS insurance
  FROM q
)
INSERT INTO parcel_quotes (quote_ref, sender_phone, origin_region, destination_region, weight_kg, declared_value_tzs, size_class, base_tzs, per_kg_tzs, maintenance_pct, total_tzs, insurance_tzs, tenant_slug)
SELECT quote_ref, $4, $5, $6, weight_kg, declared_value, size_class, base, per_kg, maint_pct, total, insurance, $7 FROM c
RETURNING quote_ref, total_tzs, insurance_tzs, weight_kg, size_class;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Parse SMS Args').first().json.to }},={{ $('Parse SMS Args').first().json.message }},={{ $('Parse SMS Args').first().json.related_ref }},={{ JSON.stringify($json) }},={{ $json.tenant_slug }}

parameters.jsCode: const p=$('Parse SMS Args').first().json;const toolCallId=p.toolCallId;return [{json:{results:[{toolCallId,result:`SMS imetumwa kwa ${p.to}.`}]}}];

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Parse WA Args').first().json.to }},={{ $('Parse WA Args').first().json.message }},={{ $('Parse WA Args').first().json.related_ref }},={{ JSON.stringify($json) }},={{ $json.tenant_slug }}

parameters.jsCode: const p=$('Parse WA Args').first().json;return [{json:{results:[{toolCallId:p.toolCallId,result:`Ujumbe wa WhatsApp umetumwa kwa ${p.to}.`}]}}];

const r=$input.first().json;const p=$('Parse TriggerCall Args').first().json;return [{json:{results:[{toolCallId:p.toolCallId,result:`Simu imepangwa kwa ${p.to} (kusudi: ${p.purpose}). Mteja atapigiwa ndani ya dakika moja.`}]}}];

const r=$input.first().json;const p=$('Parse Reminder Args').first().json;return [{json:{results:[{toolCallId:p.toolCallId,result:`Ukumbusho umepangwa kwa ${p.phone} kupitia ${p.channel}, utatumwa ${r.fire_at}.`}]}}];

parameters.query:
SELECT b.plate, b.class, b.photo_urls
FROM buses b
LEFT JOIN trips t ON t.bus_id = b.id
WHERE ($1::text IS NOT NULL AND b.plate ILIKE $1)
   OR ($2::int IS NOT NULL AND b.id = $2)
   OR ($3::int IS NOT NULL AND t.id = $3)
  AND tenant_slug = $4
LIMIT 1;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='HELD')      AS held_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='CONFIRMED') AS confirmed_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='CANCELLED') AS cancelled_count,
  COALESCE(SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE status='CONFIRMED'),0)::bigint AS revenue_today
FROM bookings
WHERE created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE;
  AND tenant_slug = $1

-- /* tenancy:patched */

SELECT
  COUNT(*)::int AS bookings,
  COALESCE(SUM(amount),0)::bigint AS revenue,
  $1::date AS start_date,
  $2::date AS end_date
FROM bookings
WHERE status='CONFIRMED'
  AND paid_at::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date;
  AND tenant_slug = $3

-- /* tenancy:patched */

parameters.jsCode: const r=$input.first().json;const p=$('Parse Revenue Args').first().json;const result=`Mapato kati ya ${p.start} na ${p.end}:\nBuki zilizothibitishwa: ${r.bookings}\nJumla ya mapato: TZS ${Number(r.revenue).toLocaleString()}`;return [{json:{results:[{toolCallId:p.toolCallId,result}]}}];

parameters.query:
SELECT ref, passenger_name, phone, amount, hold_expires_at
FROM bookings
WHERE status='HELD' AND hold_expires_at > NOW()
  AND tenant_slug = $1
ORDER BY hold_expires_at ASC LIMIT 20;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

parameters.jsCode: const rows=$input.all().map(i=>i.json);const p=$('Parse PH Args').first().json;let result;if(!rows.length){result='Hakuna hifadhi inayosubiri kwa sasa.';}else{result='Hifadhi zinazosubiri malipo:\n'+rows.map((r,i)=>{const m=Math.round((new Date(r.hold_expires_at)-new Date())/60000);return `${i+1}. ${r.ref} | ${r.passenger_name} (${r.phone}) | TZS ${Number(r.amount).toLocaleString()} | dakika ${m} zimebakia`;}).join('\n');}return [{json:{results:[{toolCallId:p.toolCallId,result}]}}];

parameters.query:
SELECT district, region, request_count, last_requested
FROM service_gaps
WHERE tenant_slug = $1
ORDER BY request_count DESC, last_requested DESC
LIMIT 10;
-- /* tenancy:patched */

parameters.jsCode: const rows=$input.all().map(i=>i.json);const p=$('Parse SGR Args').first().json;let result;if(!rows.length){result='Hakuna maeneo yasiyohudumiwa yaliyoombwa hivi karibuni.';}else{result='Maeneo yaliyoombwa lakini hatuna huduma:\n'+rows.map((r,i)=>`${i+1}. ${r.district}${r.region?', '+r.region:''} — maombi ${r.request_count}`).join('\n');}return [{json:{results:[{toolCallId:p.toolCallId,result}]}}];

parameters.query:
SELECT phone, passenger_name, bookings_count, confirmed_count, cancelled_count, last_booking_at, total_spend, recent_refs
FROM customer_history_v
WHERE phone = $1;
  AND tenant_slug = $2

-- /* tenancy:patched */
